mapper.select: SELECT org_key AS orgKey, org_name AS orgName, my_domain AS myDomain, target_schema AS targetSchema, target_table AS targetTable, instance_name AS instanceName, org_type AS orgType, is_sandbox AS sandbox, selected_object AS objectName, object_label AS objectLabel, routing_protocol AS protocol, routing_endpoint AS endpoint, routing_status AS routingStatus, source_status AS sourceStatus, initial_load_count AS initialLoadCount, last_error_message AS lastErrorMessage, activated_at AS activatedAt, released_at AS releasedAt, last_synced_at AS lastSyncedAt FROM routing.routing_registry WHERE routing_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY org_name ASC, selected_object ASC, routing_protocol ASC

SELECT org_key AS orgKey, org_name AS orgName, my_domain AS myDomain, target_schema AS targetSchema, target_table AS targetTable, instance_name AS instanceName, org_type AS orgType, is_sandbox AS sandbox, selected_object AS objectName, object_label AS objectLabel, routing_protocol AS protocol, routing_endpoint AS endpoint, routing_status AS routingStatus, source_status AS sourceStatus, initial_load_count AS initialLoadCount, last_error_message AS lastErrorMessage, activated_at AS activatedAt, released_at AS releasedAt, last_synced_at AS lastSyncedAt FROM routing.routing_registry WHERE routing_status = 'ACTIVE' AND org_key = #{orgKey} ORDER BY selected_object ASC, routing_protocol ASC

SELECT DISTINCT org_key AS orgKey, org_name AS orgName, my_domain AS myDomain, target_schema AS targetSchema, instance_name AS instanceName, org_type AS orgType, is_sandbox AS sandbox FROM routing.routing_registry WHERE routing_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY org_name ASC

SELECT DISTINCT org_key AS orgKey, org_name AS orgName, my_domain AS myDomain, target_schema AS targetSchema, instance_name AS instanceName, org_type AS orgType, is_sandbox AS sandbox FROM routing.routing_registry WHERE routing_status = 'ACTIVE' AND org_key = #{orgKey} ORDER BY org_name ASC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS used, 5 AS `limit` FROM routing.ingestion_slot_registry

SELECT id, org_key AS orgKey, org_name AS orgName, my_domain AS myDomain, target_schema AS targetSchema, target_table AS targetTable, instance_name AS instanceName, org_type AS orgType, is_sandbox AS sandbox, selected_object AS objectName, object_label AS objectLabel, routing_protocol AS protocol, routing_endpoint AS endpoint, routing_status AS routingStatus, source_status AS sourceStatus, initial_load_count AS initialLoadCount, last_error_message AS lastErrorMessage, activated_at AS activatedAt, released_at AS releasedAt, last_synced_at AS lastSyncedAt FROM routing.routing_registry WHERE org_key = #{orgKey} AND selected_object = #{selectedObject} AND routing_protocol = #{routingProtocol} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO routing.routing_registry ( org_key, org_name, my_domain, target_schema, target_table, instance_name, org_type, is_sandbox, selected_object, object_label, routing_protocol, routing_endpoint, routing_status, source_status, initial_load_count, last_error_message, activated_at, released_at, last_synced_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{orgKey}, #{orgName}, #{myDomain}, #{targetSchema}, #{targetTable}, #{instanceName}, #{orgType}, #{sandbox}, #{selectedObject}, #{objectLabel}, #{routingProtocol}, #{routingEndpoint}, #{routingStatus}, #{sourceStatus}, #{initialLoadCount}, #{lastErrorMessage}, COALESCE(#{activatedAt}, NOW()), #{releasedAt}, COALESCE(#{lastSyncedAt}, NOW()), #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE org_name = VALUES(org_name), my_domain = VALUES(my_domain), target_schema = VALUES(target_schema), target_table = VALUES(target_table), instance_name = VALUES(instance_name), org_type = VALUES(org_type), is_sandbox = VALUES(is_sandbox), object_label = VALUES(object_label), routing_endpoint = VALUES(routing_endpoint), routing_status = VALUES(routing_status), source_status = VALUES(source_status), initial_load_count = VALUES(initial_load_count), last_error_message = VALUES(last_error_message), released_at = VALUES(released_at), last_synced_at = VALUES(last_synced_at), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE routing.routing_registry SET routing_status = 'RELEASED', source_status = 'INACTIVE', last_error_message = 'Salesforce 실시간 동기화 결과 현재 비활성 상태', released_at = NOW(), last_synced_at = NOW(), updated_by = 'sync', updated_at = NOW() WHERE org_key = #{orgKey} AND my_domain = #{myDomain} AND (last_synced_at IS NULL OR last_synced_at < #{syncedAt})

UPDATE routing.routing_registry SET routing_status = 'RELEASED', source_status = 'INACTIVE', last_error_message = #{message}, released_at = NOW(), last_synced_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE org_key = #{orgKey} AND selected_object = #{selectedObject} AND routing_protocol = #{routingProtocol}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO routing.routing_history ( routing_registry_id, org_key, selected_object, routing_protocol, event_type, event_status, event_stage, endpoint, message, detail_text, initial_load_count, actor, created_at ) VALUES ( #{routingRegistryId}, #{orgKey}, #{selectedObject}, #{routingProtocol}, #{eventType}, #{eventStatus}, #{eventStage}, #{endpoint}, #{message}, #{detailText}, #{initialLoadCount}, #{actor}, NOW() )
